summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Driver Gig CRM after Email Manager removal and Activity Log rename to Communications. All 15 test features verified successfully. The app uses MOCK DATA (no backend API calls).
passed_tests: Sidebar shows exactly 5 items: Dashboard, Companies, Pipeline, Communications, Settings
Sidebar does NOT show 'Activity Log' or 'Email Manager' (correctly removed)
Communications page has title 'Communications' with subtitle 'All calls, emails, meetings & notes in one place'
Communications page has '+ Log Activity' button at top
Communications page has '✉ Compose Email' button at top
Communications page has '↓ Export CSV' button at top
Communications table has columns: Date/Time, Company, Type, Outcome, Handler, Notes, Next Action, delete(✕)
3 mock data rows appear in table (Amazon Flex Phone, Amazon Flex Email, GoShare Email)
Clicking '+ Log Activity' opens inline form with Company, Type, Outcome, Handler, Next Action, Notes fields
Clicking '✉ Compose Email' opens inline email form with Company, Direction, To/From Email, Reply By, Subject, Body fields
Can save new activity via Log Activity form - appears in table with correct data
Can save new email via Compose Email form - appears as type 'Email' with 'Sent' outcome in table
Search filter works - typing 'GoShare' filters table to 1 row
Delete button (✕) removes row from table
Dashboard page shows 'Recent Activity' section with 'View all →' link that navigates to Communications
Companies page renders with table, filters, and '+ Add Company' button
Pipeline page works with 6 kanban columns (Researching, Applied, Waiting, Offered, Active, Overdue)
Settings page works with Handler Management, Driver Profile, and Data Management sections

success_rate.backend: N/A (skipped - frontend only test, app uses MOCK DATA)

test_credentials: N/A - App uses mock data, no authentication required
seed_data_creation: Mock data from mockData.js: 8 companies, 3 activities, 3 handlers
context_for_next_testing_agent: All frontend features working correctly after Email Manager removal and Activity Log rename to Communications. The app uses ONLY inline styles (no Tailwind, no Shadcn). All state is in-memory from mockData.js. data-testid attributes are present on key elements: communications-page, log-activity-btn, compose-email-btn, activity-compose-form, email-compose-form, comm-search, comm-row-{id}, delete-comm-{id}, save-activity-btn, save-email-btn.

mocked_apis.All CRUD operations: Frontend uses mock data from mockData.js, no real API calls
